economic_notes: Katzie Development Corporation Ltd. and Katzie Development Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Katzie Development Limited Partnership had total revenue of $3,886,929 and net income of $381,872 for year ended December 31, 2021. Nation consolidated six entities: Bus Corporation, Smuqwa Development Corporation, Cultural Education Society, Early Years Society, Housing Society, Affordable Housing Development Society.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Nation has 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 2 GBEs (Katzie Development Corporation Ltd. and Katzie Development Limited Partnership) accounted for under modified equity method. GBE fiscal year ends December 31. Foreign exchange loss of $34,734 recorded as other expense. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $4,061,229 + Province of BC $1,259,448 + First Nations Health Authority $1,124,988 + Government of Canada $418,654 + CMHC $80,430 + Fisheries and Oceans Canada $807,280 + BC Treaty Commission $620,000 + SSET $152,289 + FNESC $100,939 + New Relationship Trust $4,000 + Surrey Schools $1,385 = $8,630,642; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Investments include both regular and trust components totalling $14,413,390. BC Housing loan of $819,835 has no set repayment schedule.
